reasoning_model_1: The model completely fails the Content Accuracy criterion. Instead of reading the required sentence 'Really? Quick, tell me the details!', the audio only consists of a repeated, glitchy snippet that sounds like 'Details, details' (0:00-0:03). Because the content is clearly inconsistent with the script and missing the vast majority of the text, it receives a score of 0 regardless of the pitch used.
reasoning_model_2: The model performs excellently across all criteria. Content Accuracy is perfect (0:00-0:04), matching the script exactly. Fluency and Naturalness are high; the prosody is very human-like with natural intonation. Regarding Paralinguistic Compliance (Pitch), the model effectively adopts a higher pitch register to convey the urgency and excitement requested. The pitch is noticeably elevated on 'Really?' (0:00-0:01) and 'Quick' (0:01-0:02), fitting the command well while remaining natural.
model_comparison: There is a stark difference in quality. Model 1 failed to generate the correct text, outputting only a repetitive fragment, rendering it unusable. Model 2 followed the command perfectly, delivering the correct text with high fluency and accurately applying the requested high pitch paralinguistic feature.
